ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development; ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors. ROS1, overexpressed in certain cancer cells, plays a key role in cell growth and survival of cancer cells.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准佩米替尼用于既往接受过治疗的携带FGFR2融合或重排的不可切除局部晚期或转移性胆管癌成人患者的治疗。
NMPA批准佩米替尼用于既往至少接受过一种系统性治疗，且经检测确认存在有FGFR2融合或重排的晚期、转移性或不可手术切除的胆管癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准佩米替尼用于FGFR1重排的髓系/淋巴肿瘤（MLN）成人患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 胆管癌;Cholangiocarcinoma

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Pemigatinib是一种靶向FGFR1、2和3的小分子激酶抑制剂，IC50值小于2 nM。 Pemigatinib在体外对FGFR4的抑制作用也比抑制FGFR1、2和3的抑制作用高约100倍。Pemigatinib通过激活FGFR扩增和融合作用而抑制FGFR1-3磷酸化和信号传导并降低细胞活力，从而导致FGFR信号的组成性激活。 组成性FGFR信号传导可以支持恶性细胞的增殖和存活。 Pemigatinib在具有FGFR1，FGFR2或FGFR3改变的人类肿瘤的小鼠异种移植模型中表现出抗肿瘤活性，从而导致FGFR的组成性激活，包括表达肿瘤致癌性FGFR2Transformer-2β同源（TRA2b）融合蛋白的源自患者的胆管癌异种移植模型。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the fibroblast growth factor receptor (FGFR) types 1, 2, and 3 (FGFR1/2/3), with potential antineoplastic activity. Pemigatinib binds to and inhibits FGFR1/2/3, which may result in the inhibition of FGFR1/2/3-related signal transduction pathways. This inhibits proliferation in FGFR1/2/3-overexpressing tumor cells. FGFR, a family of receptor tyrosine kinases upregulated in many tumor cell types, plays a key role in cellular proliferation, migration, and survival.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准普拉替尼用于携带RET突变、需要系统性治疗的晚期或转移性甲状腺髓样癌（MTC）成年患者或者≥12岁的儿童患者。
FDA批准普拉替尼用于RET融合阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌的成年患者。
FDA批准普拉替尼用于治疗12岁及以上、RET融合阳性的晚期或转移性甲状腺癌成人及儿童患者，这些患者需要系统治疗并且为放射性碘难治性（如果放射性碘是合适的）。
NMPA批准普拉替尼用于既往接受过含铂化疗的转染重排（RET）基因融合阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）成人患者的治疗。
NMPA批准普拉替尼用于需要系统性治疗的晚期或转移性RET突变型甲状腺髓样癌（MTC）成人和12岁及以上儿童患者的治疗，以及需要系统性治疗且放射性碘难治（如果放射性碘适用）的晚期或转移性RET融合阳性甲状腺癌（TC）成人和12岁及以上儿童患者的治疗。
NMPA批准普拉替尼用于RET基因融合阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）成人患者的一线治疗。
NMPA批准普拉替尼用于需要系统性治疗的晚期或转移性RET突变型甲状腺髓样癌（MTC）成人和12岁及以上儿童患者的治疗，以及需要系统性治疗且放射性碘难治（如果放射性碘适用）的晚期或转移性RET融合阳性甲状腺癌（TC）成人和12岁及以上儿童患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 甲状腺髓样癌;Medullary Thyroid Cancer
非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
甲状腺癌;Thyroid Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
普拉替尼是野生型RET和致癌性RET融合蛋白（CCDC6-RET）和突变（RET V804L，RET V804M和RET M918T）的激酶抑制剂，其半数最大抑制浓度（IC50s）小于0.5 nM。在纯化的酶分析中，普拉替尼以较高的浓度抑制了DDR1，TRKC，FLT3，JAK1-2，TRKA，VEGFR2，PDGFRb和FGFR1，而Cmax在临床上仍可达到。在细胞分析中，普拉替尼抑制RET的浓度分别比VEGFR2，FGFR2和JAK2低14倍，40倍和12倍。
某些RET融合蛋白和激活点突变可以通过下游信号通路的过度激活导致的细胞生长不受控来驱动致癌潜力。 普拉替尼在具有致癌性RET融合或突变的培养细胞和动物肿瘤植入模型中表现出抗肿瘤活性，包括KIF5B-RET，CCDC6-RET，RET M918T，RET C634W，RET V804E，RET V804L和RET V804M。此外，普拉替尼可延长颅内植入表达KIF5B-RET或CCDC6-RET肿瘤模型的小鼠的存活率。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable selective inhibitor of mutant forms of and fusion products involving the proto-oncogene receptor tyrosine kinase RET, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, pralsetinib binds to and targets various RET mutants and RET-containing fusion product. RET gene mutations and translocations result in the upregulation and/or activation of RET tyrosine kinase activity in various cancer cell types; dysregulation of RET activity plays a key role in the development and regression of these cancers.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准瑞戈非尼用于治疗既往接受过以氟尿嘧啶、奥沙利铂和伊立替康为基础的化疗, 以及既往接受过或不适合接受抗VEGF治疗、抗EGFR治疗（RAS野生型）的转移性结直肠癌（mCRC）患者。
FDA批准瑞戈非尼用于治疗既往接受过以氟尿嘧啶、奥沙利铂和伊立替康为基础的化疗, 以及抗VEGF治疗、抗EGFR治疗（KRAS野生型）的转移性结直肠癌（mCRC）患者。
FDA批准瑞戈非尼用于既往接受过甲磺酸伊马替尼及苹果酸舒尼替尼治疗的局部晚期、不可切除或转移性胃肠道间质瘤患者。
FDA批准瑞戈非尼用于既往接受过索拉非尼治疗的肝细胞癌（HCC）患者。

NMPA批准瑞戈非尼用于治疗既往接受过甲磺酸伊马替尼及苹果酸舒尼替尼治疗的局部晚期的、无法手术切除的或转移性的胃肠道间质瘤（GIST）患者。
NMPA批准瑞戈非尼用于治疗既往接受过索拉非尼治疗的肝细胞癌（HCC）患者。
adaptation_disease_en: Regorafenib is indicated for the treatment of patients with metastatic colorectal cancer (CRC) who have been previously treated with fluoropyrimidine-, oxaliplatin- and irinotecan-based chemotherapy, an anti-VEGF therapy, and, if KRAS wild type, an anti-EGFR therapy.

Regorafenib is indicated for the treatment of patients with locally advanced, unresectable or metastatic gastrointestinal stromal tumour (GIST) who have been previously treated with imatinib mesylate and sunitinib malate.
Regorafenib is indicated for the treatment of patients with hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) previously treated with sorafenib.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Regorafenib（瑞格菲尼）是多种与细胞膜结合的胞内激酶的小分子抑制剂，参与正常的细胞功能以及病理过程，例如肿瘤发生，肿瘤血管生成，转移和肿瘤免疫。 在体外生化或细胞分析中，在临床上已达到的Regorafenib浓度下，Regorafenib或其主要人类活性代谢产物M-2和M-5抑制RET，VEGFR1，VEGFR2，VEGFR3，KIT，PDGFR-alpha，PDGFR-beta，FGFR1，FGFR2，TIE2， DDR2，TrkA，Eph2A，RAF-1，BRAF，BRAF V600E，SAPK2，PTK5，Abl和CSF1R的活性。 在体内模型中，Regorafenib在大鼠肿瘤模型中显示出抗血管生成活性，并在几种小鼠异种移植模型中显示出对肿瘤生长的抑制作用，其中包括对人结肠直肠癌，胃肠道间质癌和肝细胞癌的某些模型。 Regorafenib还在人大肠癌的小鼠异种移植模型和两个原位小鼠模型中显示出抗转移活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable small molecule with potential antiangiogenic and antineoplastic activities. Regorafenib binds to and inhibits vascular endothelial growth factor receptors (VEGFRs) 2 and 3, and Ret, Kit, PDGFR and Raf kinases, which may result in the inhibition of tumor angiogenesis and tumor cell proliferation. VEGFRs are receptor tyrosine kinases that play important roles in tumor angiogenesis; the receptor tyrosine kinases RET, KIT, and PDGFR, and the serine/threonine-specific Raf kinase are involved in tumor cell signaling.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: ICP-723是新一代NTRK选择性抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: ICP-723 is a highly selective next-generation TRK inhibitor.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准克唑替尼用于ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
FDA批准克唑替尼用于ROS1阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌患者。
FDA批准克唑替尼用于治疗ALK阳性的复发/难治性全身性间变性大细胞淋巴瘤(ALCL)1岁以上儿童和成人患者的治疗。
NMPA批准克唑替尼用于ROS1阳性晚期非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准克唑替尼用于ALK阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
FDA批准克唑替尼用于治疗不可切除、复发性或难治性ALK阳性的炎症性肌纤维母细胞瘤成人和大于1岁的儿童患者。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved crizotinib for adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with unresectable, recurrent, or refractory inflammatory anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive myofibroblastic tumors (IMT).
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
炎症性肌纤维母细胞瘤;Inflammatory Myofibroblastic Tumor
间变性大细胞淋巴瘤;Anaplastic Large Cell Lymphoma

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 克唑替尼是一种受体酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，可抑制包括ALK、肝细胞生长因子受体（HGFR，c-Met）、ROS1（c-ros）和Recepteur d'Origine Nantais（RON）等受体酪氨酸激酶的活性。染色体易位可以影响ALK基因，导致癌基因融合蛋白的表达。ALK融合蛋白的形成导致基因表达和信号的失活和失调，这有助于提高表达这些蛋白的肿瘤细胞的增殖和存活率。克唑替尼在使用肿瘤细胞系的细胞分析中显示出对ALK、ROS1和c-Met磷酸化的浓度依赖性抑制作用，并且在表达EML4-ALK或NPM-ALK融合蛋白或c-Met的肿瘤异种移植小鼠模型中显示出抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available aminopyridine-based inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) and the c-Met/hepatocyte growth factor receptor (HGFR) with antineoplastic activity. Crizotinib, in an ATP-competitive manner, binds to and inhibits ALK kinase and ALK fusion proteins. In addition, crizotinib inhibits c-Met kinase, and disrupts the c-Met signaling pathway. Altogether, this agent inhibits tumor cell growth. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准伊鲁阿克用于既往接受过克唑替尼治疗后疾病进展或对克唑替尼不耐受的间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK）阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
NMPA批准伊鲁阿克用于一线治疗ALK阳性的非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 伊鲁阿克(Iruplinalkib)是一种口服的小分子受体酪氨酸激酶(RTK)间变性淋巴瘤激酶(ALK)抑制剂，可通过抑制 ALK 和 ROS1 激酶的磷酸化进而阻断 ERK、STAT5 和 AKT 等下游信号通路蛋白的激活，从而诱导肿瘤细胞死亡（凋亡）。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available, small molecule inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase (RTK) anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, WX-0593 binds to and inhibits ALK tyrosine kinase, ALK fusion proteins, ALK point mutation variants ALK L1196M, ALK C1156Y, and EGFR L858R/T790M. Inhibition of ALK leads to the disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and the inhibition of cell growth in ALK-expressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK is not expressed in healthy adult human tissue but ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors. Additionally, ALK mutations are associated with acquired resistance to small molecule tyrosine kinase inhibitors.

SY-3505 is a third-generation Anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) tyrosine kinase inhibitor (TKI) against both wild-type and a broad range of mutations occurring in first-generation and second-generation ALK inhibitor-resistant patients.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Alectinib是一种口服的靶向ALK和RET的酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，具有抗肿瘤活性。给药后Alectinib结合并抑制ALK激酶、ALK融合以及耐药突变ALK L1196M，进而导致ALK介导的信号传导受损，最终抑制ALK过表达肿瘤细胞的生长。ALK属于胰岛素受体超家族，在神经系统发育中扮演重要角色；ALK失调和基因重排与一系列肿瘤有关。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, alectinib binds to and inhibits ALK kinase, ALK fusion proteins as well as the gatekeeper mutation ALKL1196M known as one of the mechanisms of acquired resistance to small-molecule kinase inhibitors. The inhibition leads to disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and eventually inhibits tumor cell growth in ALK-overexpressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.
Foritinib (SAF-189s) is a potent, brain-penetrant, next-generation anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) inhibitor with preclinical activity against most known resistance mutations of ALK.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: APG-2449是一种新型口服活性FAK抑制剂，也是第三代ALK/ROS1 TKI，在临床前NSCLC、间皮瘤和其他实体肿瘤模型中对一系列ALK耐药突变显示出强大的活性，包括G1202R、L1196M、V1180L、E1210K、S1206F、G1269A、F1174L、I1171S和C1156Y。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: APG-2449 is a novel, orally active FAK inhibitor and a third-generation ALK/ROS1 TKI that has shown potent activity against a range of ALK-resistant mutations, including G1202R, L1196M, V1180L, E1210K, S1206F, G1269A, F1174L, I1171S, and C1156Y in preclinical NSCLC, mesothelioma, and other solid tumor models.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: HS-10365是一种高效的选择性酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，临床前研究表明其在RET改变的肿瘤模型中具有良好的安全性和抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: HS-10365 is a highly potent and selective tyrosine kinase inhibitor, and the preclinical studies have indicated its favorable safety and antitumor activity in RET-altered tumor models.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿比特龙是一种具有抗雄激素活性的口服醋酸酯甾体化合物，阿比特龙抑制类固醇17a-单加氧酶的酶活性，它是细胞色素p450家族的一员，催化参与睾酮合成的类固醇中间体的17a-羟基化。这种药剂可能会抑制睾丸和肾上腺产生睾酮，从而达到阉割范围水平。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally active acetate ester form of the steroidal compound abiraterone with antiandrogen activity. Abiraterone inhibits the enzymatic activity of steroid 17alpha-monooxygenase (17alpha-hydrolase/C17,20 lyase complex), a member of the cytochrome p450 family that catalyzes the 17alpha-hydroxylation of steroid intermediates involved in testosterone synthesis. Administration of this agent may suppress testosterone production by both the testes and the adrenals to castrate-range levels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节作用的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着进入细胞后，泼尼松进入核内，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变和抑制促炎性细胞因子的产生。该药物还能减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cell populations.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿比特龙是一种具有抗雄激素活性的口服醋酸酯甾体化合物，阿比特龙抑制类固醇17a-单加氧酶的酶活性，它是细胞色素p450家族的一员，催化参与睾酮合成的类固醇中间体的17a-羟基化。这种药剂可能会抑制睾丸和肾上腺产生睾酮，从而达到阉割范围水平。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally active acetate ester form of the steroidal compound abiraterone with antiandrogen activity. Abiraterone inhibits the enzymatic activity of steroid 17alpha-monooxygenase (17alpha-hydrolase/C17,20 lyase complex), a member of the cytochrome p450 family that catalyzes the 17alpha-hydroxylation of steroid intermediates involved in testosterone synthesis. Administration of this agent may suppress testosterone production by both the testes and the adrenals to castrate-range levels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松龙是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节特性的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着并进入细胞后，泼尼松龙进入细胞核，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变，并抑制促炎细胞因子的产生。这种药剂还减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisolone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cells populations. (NCI04)

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松龙

drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the proto-oncogene receptor tyrosine kinase rearranged during transfection (RET), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, RET inhibitor SY-5007 selectively binds to and inhibits the activity of RET. This results in an inhibition of cell growth of tumors that exhibit increased RET activity. RET overexpression, activating mutations, and fusions result in the upregulation and/or overactivation of RET tyrosine kinase activity in various cancer cell types; dysregulation of RET activity plays a key role in the development and progression of these cancers.

An orally bioavailable selective inhibitor of the proto-oncogene receptor tyrosine kinase rearranged during transfection (RET), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, RET inhibitor EP0031 selectively binds to various RET fusions and mutations, including solvent front resistance mutations, and inhibits the activity of RET. This results in an inhibition of cell growth of tumors that exhibit increased RET activity due to these fusions and mutations. RET overexpression, activating mutations, and fusions result in the upregulation and/or overactivation of RET tyrosine kinase activity in various cancer cell types. Dysregulated RET activity plays a key role in the development and progression of certain cancers. EP0031 is able to penetrate the blood-brain barrier (BBB) and may also be able to overcome resistance mechanisms to first generation selective RET inhibitors (SRIs).

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准特泊替尼（Tepotinib）用于治疗携带MET外显子14跳跃变异的转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者。
NMPA批准特泊替尼用于治疗携带间质上皮转化因子（MET）外显子14跳跃突变的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）成人患者。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 特泊替尼(tepotinib) 是一种靶向 MET 的激酶抑制剂，包括具有外显子 14 跳跃改变的变体。特泊替尼抑制肝细胞生长因子 (HGF) 依赖性和非依赖性 MET 磷酸化和 MET 依赖性下游信号通路。 特泊替尼 还抑制褪黑激素 2 和咪唑啉 1 受体在临床上可达到的浓度。在体外，特泊替尼 抑制肿瘤细胞增殖、不依赖贴壁的生长和MET 依赖性肿瘤细胞的迁移。 在植入具有 MET 致癌激活的肿瘤细胞系的小鼠中，包括 METex14 跳跃改变，特泊替尼抑制肿瘤生长，导致持续抑制MET 磷酸化，并且在一种模型中，减少了转移的形成。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An inhibitor of MET tyrosine kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Tepotinib selectively binds to MET tyrosine kinase and disrupts MET signal transduction pathways, which may induce apoptosis in tumor cells overexpressing this kinase. The receptor tyrosine kinase MET (also known as hepatocyte growth factor receptor or HGFR), is the product of the proto-oncogene c-Met and is overexpressed or mutated in many tumor cell types; this protein plays key roles in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion, and metastasis, and tumor angiogenesis.

An orally bioavailable, second-generation tropomyosin-related-kinase (TRK) inhibitor, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, TRK inhibitor VC004 specifically targets and binds to TRK, TRK mutations and fusion proteins containing sequences from neurotrophic tyrosine receptor kinase (NTRK) types 1 (NTRK1; TrkA), 2 (NTRK2; TrkB), and 3 (NTRK3; TrkC). This inhibits neurotrophin-TRK interaction and TRK activation, thereby preventing the activation of downstream signaling pathways, including the PI3K, RAS/MAPK/ERK and PLC-gamma pathways that are activated by these kinases. This results in both the induction of cellular apoptosis and the inhibition of cell growth in tumors that overexpress TRK and/or express NTRK fusion proteins. TRK, a family of receptor tyrosine kinases (RTKs) activated by neurotrophins, is encoded by NTRK family genes. The expression of either mutated forms of, or fusion proteins involving NTRK family members results in uncontrolled TRK signaling, which plays an important role in tumor cell growth, survival, invasion and treatment resistance.

An orally bioavailable, selective inhibitor of human fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 (FGFR3), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, FGFR3 inhibitor LOXO-435 specifically targets and binds to FGFR3, including FGFR3 gatekeeper resistance mutations. This blocks FGFR3-mediated signaling and leads to an inhibition of tumor cell proliferation in FGFR3-overexpressing cells. FGFR3, a receptor tyrosine kinase, is involved in angiogenesis and in the proliferation, differentiation, and survival of tumor cells. FGFR3 expression is associated with poor prognosis. It is overexpressed and/or mutated by certain tumor cell types.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: NVL-520是一种新型ROS1选择性酪氨酸激酶抑制剂（TKI），具有穿透血脑屏障的能力，旨在克服现有的ROS1 TKI治疗药物存在的一些局限性，包括治疗耐药、脑转移、中枢神经系统不良事件等问题。

Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 第四代ALK抑制剂

PD-L1可以在肿瘤细胞和/或肿瘤浸润性免疫细胞上表达，并且可以在肿瘤微环境中有助于抑制抗肿瘤免疫反应。PD-L1与T细胞和抗原呈递细胞上的PD-1和B7.1受体结合，抑制细胞毒性T细胞活性、T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。
Atezolizumab是与PD-L1结合并阻断其与PD-1和B7.1受体相互作用的单克隆抗体。这释放了PD-L1 / PD-1介导的免疫反应抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤免疫反应的激活，而不会引起抗体依赖性细胞毒性。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-L1活性可导致肿瘤生长减少。
在癌症的小鼠模型中，与单独的靶向治疗相比，PD-1 / PD-L1和MAPK途径的双重抑制可通过增加抗原呈递，T细胞浸润和激活来抑制肿瘤生长并提高肿瘤免疫原性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A humanized, Fc optimized, monoclonal antibody directed against the protein ligand PD-L1 (programmed cell death-1 ligand 1), with potential immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Atezolizumab binds to PD-L1, blocking its binding to and activation of its receptor programmed death 1 (PD-1) expressed on activated T-cells, which may enhance the T-cell-mediated immune response to neoplasms and reverse T-cell inactivation. In addition, by binding to PD-L1, MPDL3280A also prevents binding of this ligand to B7.1 expressed on activated T cells, which further enhances the T-cell-mediated immune response. PD-L1 is overexpressed on many human cancer cell types and on various tumor-infiltrating immune cells. PD-L1 binding to PD-1 on T-cells suppresses the immune system and results in increased immune evasion. PD-1, a transmembrane protein, is a negative regulator of the immune system that limits the expansion and survival of CD8+ T cells. The Fc region of MPDL3280A is modified in such a way that it does not induce either antibody-dependent cytotoxicity (ADCC) or complement-dependent cytotoxicity (CDC).

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 紫杉醇是一种抗微管类的化疗药物。 紫杉醇常用于多种癌症治疗中，它是一种有丝分裂抑制剂，是于 1971 年从太平洋紫杉树的树皮中首次分离出来，并于1993年批准用于医学用途，并被列于世界卫生组织的基本药物清单。 紫杉醇的作用机理主要是去影响微管的正常功能，透过稳定与GDP结合的微管蛋白，从而致使快速分裂的肿瘤细胞在有丝分裂阶段被限制而无法分离，将细胞阻断于细胞周期之G2与M期间，使癌细胞复制受阻断而死亡。因此紫杉醇在抗癌药物当中，被视为有丝分裂中的微管抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Paclitaxel is a chemotherapeutic agent marketed under the brand name Taxol among others. Used as a treatment for various cancers, paclitaxel is a mitotic inhibitor that was first isolated in 1971 from the bark of the Pacific yew tree which contains endophytic fungi that synthesize paclitaxel. It is available as an intravenous solution for injection and the newer formulation contains albumin-bound paclitaxel marketed under the brand name Abraxane.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡铂的主要作用是将烷基连接到核苷酸上，导致单加合物的形成，以及当修复酶试图纠正错误时 DNA 片段化。 2% 的卡铂活性来自 DNA 从一条链上的碱基到另一条上碱基的交联，从而防止 DNA 链分离以进行合成或转录。卡铂可以诱导许多不同的突变。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Carboplatin is an organoplatinum antineoplastic alkylating agent used in the treatment of advanced ovarian carcinoma.Early clinical studies of carboplatin were performed in 1982. Carboplatin was developed as an analog of cisplatin with reduced nephrotoxicity and vomiting.Carboplatin was granted FDA approval on 3 March 1989.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 阿替利珠单抗+贝伐珠单抗+紫杉醇+卡铂

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: TGRX-326是由塔吉瑞生物医药公司自主研发的靶向作用于EML4-ALK融合基因的高选择性的间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK）和 ROS1 第三代高效抑制剂，用于治疗ALK/ROS1基因变异的非小细胞肺癌患者。
TYRA-300是一种在研、口服、潜在、“first-in-class”的FGFR3选择性抑制剂，旨在避免因抑制FGFR1、FGFR2和FGFR4所造成的毒性，并可抑制具有不同变异FGFR3的特性。
Datopotamab deruxtecan（Dato-DXd）是一种针对Trop2的ADC，由一种人源化抗Trop2单克隆抗体，与多个拓扑异构酶I抑制剂有效载荷（DXd）通过可裂解的四肽连接子偶联生成。

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准依奉阿克用于未经过间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK）抑制剂治疗的ALK阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 依奉阿克是一种口服小分子受体酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，对ALK和MET均具有潜在的抗肿瘤活性。口服给药后，其结合并抑制ALK和c-Met的活性，从而破坏ALK和c-Met介导的信号传导，并抑制表达ALK和c-Met肿瘤细胞的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available, small molecule inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinases anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) and hepatocyte growth factor receptor (c-Met; HGFR), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, TQ-B3139 binds to and inhibits the activity of ALK and c-Met, which leads to the disruption of ALK- and c-Met-mediated signaling and the inhibition of cell growth in ALK- and c-Met-expressing tumor cells. ALK and c-Met, overexpressed or mutated in many tumor cell types, play key roles in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion and metastasis.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌成人患者的治疗。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Talazoparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) HER2-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.
approval_tumour: 乳腺癌;Breast Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 他拉唑帕利是一种聚腺苷二磷酸核糖聚合酶（PARP，包括PARP1和PARP2）抑制剂，该酶在 DNA 修复中发挥作用。携带DNA修复基因（包括BRCA1和BRCA2）缺陷的癌细胞系的体外试验显示，他拉唑帕利诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞增殖减少和细胞凋亡。他拉唑帕利在携带突变型BRCA1和BRCA2或野生型BRCA1和BRCA2的患者来源的乳腺癌异种移植瘤模型中可见抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential antineoplastic activity. Talazoparib selectively binds to PARP and prevents PARP-mediated DNA repair of single strand DNA breaks via the base-excision repair pathway. This enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability and eventually leads to apoptosis. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins that signal and recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA and is activated by single-strand DNA breaks.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA附条件批准伯瑞替尼用于治疗具有间质-上皮转化因子（MET）外显子14跳变的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者。
NMPA批准伯瑞替尼肠溶胶囊用于治疗经放疗和替莫唑胺（TMZ）治疗后复发或不可耐受的，具有PTPRZ1-MET（ZM）融合突变的IDH突变型星形细胞瘤（WHO 4级）或既往有较低级别病史的胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 伯瑞替尼是一种c-Met抑制剂，具有潜在的抗肿瘤相应。给药后，伯瑞替尼可以选择性地和c-Met结合，抑制c-Met磷酸化并干扰其信号传导通路，可诱导c-Met过表达或持续激活的细胞的死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the proto-oncogene c-Met (hepatocyte growth factor receptor; HGFR) with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, bozitinib selectively binds to c-Met, thereby inhibiting c-Met phosphorylation and disrupting c-Met signal transduction pathways. This may induce cell death in tumor cells overexpressing or expressing constitutively activated c-Met protein. c-Met, a receptor tyrosine kinase overexpressed or mutated in many tumor cell types, plays key roles in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion, metastasis, and tumor angiogenesis.

adaptation_disease_cn:
FDA批准卡博替尼用于晚期肾细胞癌（RCC）患者的治疗。
FDA批准卡博替尼用于既往接受过索拉非尼治疗的肝细胞癌（HCC）患者的治疗。
FDA批准卡博替尼用于经既往VEGFR靶向治疗后进展的放射性碘难治性、局部晚期或转移性分化型甲状腺癌(DTC)的12岁及以上的成人和儿童患者。
FDA批准卡博替尼用于年龄在 12 岁及以上、且此前接受过治疗的、无法切除的、局部晚期或转移性的、分化良好的胰腺神经内分泌肿瘤（pNET）患者。
FDA批准卡博替尼用于年龄在 12 岁及以上、且此前接受过治疗的、无法切除的、局部晚期或转移性的、分化良好的胰腺外神经内分泌肿瘤（epNET）患者。
FDA批准卡博替尼用于疾病进展或转移性甲状腺髓样癌（MTC）患者的治疗。
adaptation_disease_en:
The FDA has approved cabozantinib for the treatment of patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC).
The FDA has approved cabozantinib for the treatment of patients with hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) who have been previously treated with sorafenib.
The FDA has approved cabozantinib for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older with radioiodine-refractory, locally advanced or metastatic differentiated thyroid cancer (DTC) that has progressed following prior VEGFR-targeted therapy.
The FDA has approved cabozantinib for the treatment of patients aged 12 years and older with unresectable, locally advanced or metastatic, well-differentiated pancreatic neuroendocrine tumors (pNET) who have been previously treated.
The FDA has approved cabozantinib for the treatment of patients aged 12 years and older with unresectable, locally advanced or metastatic, well-differentiated extra-pancreatic neuroendocrine tumors (epNET) who have been previously treated.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 体外生化和/或细胞分析表明，卡博替尼抑制RET、MET、VEGFR-1、VEGFR-2、VEGFR-3、KIT、TRKB、FLT-3、AXL、ROS1、TYRO3、MER和TIE-2的酪氨酸激酶活性。这些受体酪氨酸激酶参与正常的细胞功能和病理过程，如肿瘤发生、转移、肿瘤血管生成、耐药和肿瘤微环境的维持。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, small molecule receptor tyrosine kinase (RTK) inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Cabozantinib strongly binds to and inhibits several RTKs, which are often overexpressed in a variety of cancer cell types, including hepatocyte growth factor receptor (MET), RET (rearranged during transfection), vascular endothelial growth factor receptor types 1 (VEGFR-1), 2 (VEGFR-2), and 3 (VEGFR-3), mast/stem cell growth factor (KIT), FMS-like tyrosine kinase 3 (FLT-3), TIE-2 (TEK tyrosine kinase, endothelial), tropomyosin-related kinase B (TRKB) and AXL. This may result in an inhibition of both tumor growth and angiogenesis, and eventually lead to tumor regression.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准卡马替尼用于携带可导致MET 14外显子跳跃突变的转移性非小细胞肺癌成人患者的治疗。
NMPA批准卡马替尼用于携带可导致MET 14外显子跳跃突变的转移性非小细胞肺癌成人患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡马替尼是一种靶向MET突变（包括由MET14号外显子跳跃突变）的激酶抑制剂。MET14号外显子跳跃突变会导致蛋白质调节域缺失，从而降低负调控，并增加下游MET信号。卡马替尼在临床可达浓度下可抑制由MET14号外显子缺失突变驱动的肿瘤细胞，并且在携MET14号外显子跳跃突变或MET扩增突变的人源肺癌异种移植小鼠模型中显示了抗肿瘤活性。卡马替尼可抑制由肝细胞生长因子结合或MET扩增引起的MET磷酸化、MET介导的下游信号蛋白磷酸化和MET依赖性癌细胞的增殖和存活。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the proto-oncogene c-Met (also known as hepatocyte growth factor receptor (HGFR)) with potential antineoplastic activity. Capmatinib selectively binds to c-Met, thereby inhibiting c-Met phosphorylation and disrupting c-Met signal transduction pathways. This may induce cell death in tumor cells overexpressing c-Met protein or expressing constitutively activated c-Met protein. c-Met, a receptor tyrosine kinase overexpressed or mutated in many tumor cell types, plays key roles in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion, metastasis, and tumor angiogenesis.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准阿来替尼用于ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准阿来替尼用于ALK阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
FDA批准阿来替尼用于ALK阳性非小细胞肺癌（肿瘤≥4cm或淋巴结阳性）成人患者肿瘤切除后的辅助治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Alectinib是一种口服的靶向ALK和RET的酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，具有抗肿瘤活性。给药后Alectinib结合并抑制ALK激酶、ALK融合以及耐药突变ALK L1196M，进而导致ALK介导的信号传导受损，最终抑制ALK过表达肿瘤细胞的生长。ALK属于胰岛素受体超家族，在神经系统发育中扮演重要角色；ALK失调和基因重排与一系列肿瘤有关。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, alectinib binds to and inhibits ALK kinase, ALK fusion proteins as well as the gatekeeper mutation ALKL1196M known as one of the mechanisms of acquired resistance to small-molecule kinase inhibitors. The inhibition leads to disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and eventually inhibits tumor cell growth in ALK-overexpressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 他拉唑帕利是一种聚腺苷二磷酸核糖聚合酶（PARP，包括PARP1和PARP2）抑制剂，该酶在 DNA 修复中发挥作用。携带DNA修复基因（包括BRCA1和BRCA2）缺陷的癌细胞系的体外试验显示，他拉唑帕利诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞增殖减少和细胞凋亡。他拉唑帕利在携带突变型BRCA1和BRCA2或野生型BRCA1和BRCA2的患者来源的乳腺癌异种移植瘤模型中可见抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential antineoplastic activity. Talazoparib selectively binds to PARP and prevents PARP-mediated DNA repair of single strand DNA breaks via the base-excision repair pathway. This enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability and eventually leads to apoptosis. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins that signal and recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA and is activated by single-strand DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Enzalutamide是一种雄激素受体抑制剂，可在雄激素受体信号传导途径的不同步骤上起作用。 恩杂鲁胺已被证明具有竞争性抑制雄激素与雄激素受体结合的能力。 因此，抑制雄激素受体的核易位及其与DNA的相互作用。 主要代谢物N-去甲基enzalutamide具有与enzalutamide相似的体外活性。 在小鼠前列腺癌异种移植模型中，Enzalutamide降低了体外前列腺癌细胞的增殖并诱导了细胞死亡，并降低了小鼠前列腺癌异种移植模型的肿瘤体积。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, organic, non-steroidal small molecule targeting the androgen receptor (AR) with potential antineoplastic activity. Through a mechanism that is reported to be different from other approved AR antagonists, enzalutamide inhibits the activity of prostate cancer cell ARs, which may result in a reduction in prostate cancer cell proliferation and, correspondingly, a reduction in the serum prostate specific antigen (PSA) level. AR over-expression in prostate cancer represents a key mechanism associated with prostate cancer hormone resistance.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准阿昔替尼用于既往接受过一种酪氨酸激酶抑制剂或细胞因子治疗失败的进展期肾细胞癌（RCC）的成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 已显示阿昔替尼在治疗性血浆浓度下能抑制酪氨酸激酶受体，包括血管内皮生长因子受体（VEGFR）-1，VEGFR-2和VEGFR-3。 这些受体与病理性血管生成，肿瘤生长和癌症进展有关。 阿昔替尼在体外和小鼠模型中均抑制了VEGF介导的内皮细胞的增殖和存活。 已显示阿昔替尼在肿瘤异种移植小鼠模型中抑制肿瘤生长和VEGFR-2磷酸化。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable tyrosine kinase inhibitor. Axitinib inhibits the proangiogenic cytokines vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF) and platelet-derived growth factor receptor (PDGF), thereby exerting an anti-angiogenic effect.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准他雷替尼用于经ROS1抑制剂治疗后进展的局部晚期或转移性ROS1阳性NSCLC患者。
NMPA批准他雷替尼用于未经ROS1 TKI治疗的局部晚期或转移性ROS1阳性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）成人患者的一线治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 一种口服的酪氨酸受体激酶C-ros癌基因1 (ROS1)和神经营养酪氨酸受体激酶（NTRK）1、2和3型抑制剂，具有潜在的抗肿瘤活性。口服后，他雷替尼结合并抑制ROS1和NTRK家族成员，进而导致ROS1和NTRK介导的信号通路中断，最终抑制过表达ROS1和/或NTRKs的肿瘤细胞的生长。ROS1过表达、NTRK突变或重排在癌细胞的生长和存活中均起关键作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinases C-ros oncogene 1 (ROS1) and the neurotrophic tyrosine receptor kinase (NTRK) types 1, 2 and 3, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, taletrectinib binds to and inhibits ROS1 and the NTRK family members. This inhibition leads to a disruption of ROS1- and NTRK-mediated signaling and eventually inhibits the growth of tumor cells that are overexpressing ROS1 and/or NTRKs. ROS1, overexpressed in certain cancer cells, plays a key role in cell growth and survival of cancer cells. NTRK mutations or rearrangements play a key role in cancer progression.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准富马酸安奈克替尼胶囊用于ROS1阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 安奈克替尼是一种口服的小分子靶向抑制剂，对ALK、ROS1和MET均具有潜在的抗肿瘤活性。口服后，安奈克替尼可靶向、结合并抑制ALK、ROS1、MET活性，从而破坏ALK-、ROS1-、MET-介导的信号通路，抑制肿瘤细胞生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available, small molecule inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinases anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK), C-ros oncogene 1 (ROS1) and Met (hepatocyte growth factor receptor; HGFR; c-Met), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration,unecritinib targets, binds to and inhibits the activity of ALK, ROS1 and c-Met, which leads to the disruption of ALK-, ROS1- and c-Met-mediated signaling and the inhibition of cell growth in ALK-, ROS1- and c-Met-expressing tumor cells. ALK, ROS1 and c-Met, overexpressed or mutated in many tumor cell types, play key roles in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion and metastasis.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准Ponatinib用于经至少2种激酶抑制剂治疗后耐药或不耐受的慢性粒细胞白血病慢性期（CP-CML）成年患者，需注意Ponatinib不推荐且不适用于新诊断的CP-CML患者。
FDA批准Ponatinib用于T315I阳性、无其他激酶抑制剂可用的Ph+急性淋巴细胞白血病及慢性粒细胞白血病（慢性期、加速期、急变期）成年患者；无其他激酶抑制剂可用的加速期（AP）或急变期（BP）慢性粒细胞白血病成年患者。
FDA批准Ponatinib用于T315I阳性、无其他激酶抑制剂可用的Ph+急性淋巴细胞白血病及慢性粒细胞白血病（慢性期、加速期、急变期）成年患者；无其他激酶抑制剂可用的加速期（AP）或急变期（BP）慢性粒细胞白血病成年患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Ponatinib是一种激酶抑制剂。 Ponatinib抑制ABL和T315I突变型ABL的体外酪氨酸激酶活性，IC50浓度分别为0.4 nM和2.0 nM。 Ponatinib抑制其他激酶的体外活性的IC50浓度在0.1 nM至20 nM之间，这些激酶包括VEGFR，PDGFR，FGFR，EPH受体和SRC激酶家族成员，以及KIT，RET，TIE2和FLT3。Ponatinib抑制表达天然或突变BCR-ABL（包括T315I）的细胞的体外生存能力。 在小鼠中，与对照组相比，用ponatinib治疗可减少表达天然或T315I突变BCR-ABL的肿瘤的大小。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable multitargeted receptor tyrosine kinase (RTK) inhibitor with potential antiangiogenic and antineoplastic activities. Ponatinib inhibits unmutated and all mutated forms of Bcr-Abl, including T315I, the highly drug therapy-resistant missense mutation of Bcr-Abl. This agent also inhibits other tyrosine kinases including those associated with vascular endothelial growth factor receptors (VEGFRs) and fibroblast growth factor receptors (FGFRs); in addition, it inhibits the tyrosine kinase receptor TIE2 and FMS-related tyrosine kinase receptor-3 (Flt3). RTK inhibition by ponatinib may result in the inhibition of cellular proliferation and angiogenesis and may induce cell death. Bcr-Abl is a fusion tyrosine kinase encoded by the Philadelphia chromosome.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准厄达替尼用于携带FGFR3或FGFR2基因变异且在既往至少接受过一线含铂化疗（包括12个月以内的新辅助或辅助含铂化疗）期间或之后进展的局部晚期或转移性尿路上皮癌成年患者的治疗。
FDA批准厄达替尼用于治疗携带FGFR3基因变异的、既往接受过至少一种系统性治疗出现进展的局部晚期或转移性尿路上皮癌（mUC）成年患者。另外，FDA不推荐厄达替尼用于治疗符合资格但之前未接受过PD-1或PD-L1抑制剂治疗的患者。
NMPA批准厄达替尼用于治疗携带FGFR3基因变异，且既往接受至少一线含抗PD-1或抗PD-L1期间或之后出现疾病进展的手术不可切除的局部晚期或转移性尿路上皮癌（UC）成人患者。
approval_tumour: 尿路上皮癌;Urothelial Carcinoma

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Erdafitinib是一种激酶抑制剂，可根据体外数据与FGFR1，FGFR2，FGFR3和FGFR4结合并抑制其酶促活性。 Erdafitinib还与RET，CSF1R，PDGFRA，PDGFRB，FLT4，KIT和VEGFR2结合。 Erdafitinib可抑制FGFR磷酸化和信号传导，并降低表达FGFR遗传改变（包括点突变，扩增和融合）的细胞系中的细胞活力。 Erdafitinib在表达FGFR的细胞系和源自包括膀胱癌在内的肿瘤类型的异种移植模型中显示出抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, pan fibroblast growth factor receptor (FGFR) inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, erdafitinib binds to and inhibits FGFR, which may result in the inhibition of FGFR-related signal transduction pathways and thus the inhibition of tumor cell proliferation and tumor cell death in FGFR-overexpressing tumor cells. FGFR, upregulated in many tumor cell types, is a receptor tyrosine kinase essential to tumor cell proliferation, differentiation and survival.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准Repotrectinib用于ROS1阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
NMPA批准瑞普替尼用于治疗ROS1阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）成人患者。
FDA通过加速通道批准瑞普替尼用于NTRK融合阳性、局部晚期或已转移或手术切除可能引发危重症、经治进展或无其他有效治疗方案、12岁及以上的儿童和成年实体瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 瑞普替尼是一种酪氨酸蛋白激酶原癌基因ROS1和原肌球蛋白受体酪氨酸激酶（TRKs）TRKA、TRKB及TRKC的抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of multiple kinases, including the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK), c-ros oncogene 1 (ROS1), the neurotrophic tyrosine receptor kinase (NTRK) types 1, 2 and 3, the proto-oncogene SRC, and focal adhesion kinase (FAK), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, repotrectinib binds to and inhibits wild-type, point mutants and fusion proteins of ALK, ROS1, NTRK1-3, SRC, FAK and, to a lesser extent, other kinases. Inhibition of these kinases leads to the disruption of downstream signaling pathways and the inhibition of cell growth of tumors in which these kinases are overexpressed, rearranged or mutated.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准瑞派替尼用于经至少3种激酶抑制剂（包括伊马替尼）治疗的晚期胃肠道间质瘤（GIST）患者的治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Ripretinib是一种酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，可抑制KIT原癌基因受体酪氨酸激酶（KIT）和血小板衍生生长因子受体A（PDGFRA）激酶，包括野生型，原发性和继发性突变。 Ripretinib在体外还抑制其他激酶，例如PDGFRB，TIE2，VEGFR2和BRAF。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable switch pocket control inhibitor of wild-type and mutated forms of the tumor-associated antigens (TAA) mast/stem cell factor receptor (SCFR) KIT and platelet-derived growth factor receptor alpha (PDGFR-alpha; PDGFRa), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, ripretinib targets and binds to both wild-type and mutant forms of KIT and PDGFRa specifically at their switch pocket binding sites, thereby preventing the switch from inactive to active conformations of these kinases and inactivating their wild-type and mutant forms. This abrogates KIT/PDGFRa-mediated tumor cell signaling and prevents proliferation in KIT/PDGFRa-driven cancers. DCC-2618 also inhibits several other kinases, including vascular endothelial growth factor receptor type 2 (VEGFR2; KDR), angiopoietin-1 receptor (TIE2; TEK), PDGFR-beta and macrophage colony-stimulating factor 1 receptor (FMS; CSF1R), thereby further inhibiting tumor cell growth. KIT and PDGFRa are tyrosine kinase receptors that are upregulated or mutated in a variety of cancer cell types; mutated forms play a key role in the regulation of tumor cell proliferation and resistance to chemotherapy.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准谷美替尼适用于具有间质-上皮转化因子（MET）外显子14跳跃突变的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 谷美替尼是一种口服生物可利用的小分子抑制剂c-Met(肝细胞生长因子受体;HGFR)，具有潜在的抗肿瘤活性。口服给药后，谷美替尼靶向c-Met蛋白并与之结合，从而破坏c-Met依赖的信号转导通路。这可能导致过表达c-Met蛋白或表达组成型活化c-Met蛋白的肿瘤细胞死亡。c-Met蛋白在多种肿瘤细胞中过表达或突变，在肿瘤细胞增殖、存活、侵袭、转移、肿瘤血管生成等过程中发挥重要作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, small molecule inhibitor of the oncoprotein c-Met (hepatocyte growth factor receptor; HGFR), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, glumetinib targets and binds to the c-Met protein, thereby disrupting c-Met-dependent signal transduction pathways. This may induce cell death in tumor cells overexpressing c-Met protein or expressing constitutively activated c-Met protein. c-Met protein is overexpressed or mutated in many tumor cell types and plays key roles in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion, metastasis, and tumor angiogenesis.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA通过加速通道批准塞普替尼用于携带RET突变、需要系统性治疗的晚期或转移性甲状腺髓样癌（MTC）成年患者或者≥2岁的儿童患者。
FDA批准塞普替尼用于RET融合阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌的成年患者。
FDA批准塞普替尼用于治疗RET融合阳性、需要系统治疗且放射性碘难治（如果放射性碘是合适的疗法）的晚期或转移性甲状腺癌成年患者或者≥2岁的儿童患者。
FDA通过加速通道批准塞普替尼用于治疗携带RET基因融合的局部晚期或转移性成年或者≥2岁的儿童实体瘤患者。这些患者在之前的全身系统治疗期间或之后出现进展，或者没有令人满意的替代治疗选择。
NMPA批准塞普替尼用于治疗转染重排（RET）基因融合阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）成人患者。
NMPA批准塞普替尼用于治疗需要系统性治疗的晚期或转移性RET突变型甲状腺髓样癌（MTC）成人和12岁及以上儿童患者。
NMPA批准塞普替尼用于治疗需要系统性治疗且放射性碘难治（如果放射性碘适用）的晚期或转移性RET融合阳性甲状腺癌（TC）成人和12岁及以上儿童患者。
approval_tumour: 甲状腺髓样癌;Medullary Thyroid Cancer
非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
甲状腺癌;Thyroid Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Selpercatinib是一种激酶抑制剂。Selpercatinib抑制野生型RET和多种突变的RET亚型以及VEGFR1和VEGFR3, IC50值在0.92 nM到67.8 nM之间。在其他酶分析中，Selpercatinib在临床可实现的较高的浓度下也抑制FGFR 1、2和3。在细胞实验中，Selpercatinib抑制RET的浓度，比抑制FGFR1/2低60倍，比VEGFR3低8倍。RET的某些点突变或RET与不同基因的框内融合而导致的染色体重排可导致持续激活的嵌合RET融合蛋白，该蛋白可通过促进肿瘤细胞系的细胞增殖作为致癌驱动因子。在体外和体内肿瘤模型中，Selpercatinib在携带CCDC6-RET、KIF5B-RET、RET V804M、RET M918T等基因融合和突变的细胞中均表现出抗肿瘤活性。此外，Selpercatinib在患者源性RET融合阳性的颅内移植瘤中也显示出抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable selective inhibitor of wild-type, mutant and fusion products involving the proto-oncogene receptor tyrosine kinase rearranged during transfection (RET), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, selpercatinib selectively binds to and targets various RET mutants and RET-containing fusion products. This results in an inhibition of cell growth of tumors cells that exhibit increased RET activity. RET overexpression, activating mutations, and fusions result in the upregulation and/or overactivation of RET tyrosine kinase activity in various cancer cell types; dysregulation of RET activity plays a key role in the development and progression of these cancers.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准舒尼替尼用于经甲磺酸伊马替尼治疗进展或不耐受的胃肠间质瘤（GIST）患者。
NMPA批准舒尼替尼用于甲磺酸伊马替尼治疗失败或不能耐受的胃肠间质瘤（GIST）患者。

FDA批准舒尼替尼用于晚期肾细胞癌（RCC）患者。
FDA批准舒尼替尼用于肾切除术后的复发的高危的肾细胞癌（RCC）成人患者的辅助治疗。
NMPA批准舒尼替尼用于不能手术的晚期肾细胞癌（RCC）患者。
FDA批准舒尼替尼用于不可切除的、局部晚期或转移性高分化进展期胰腺神经内分泌瘤（pNET）成年患者。
NMPA批准舒尼替尼用于不可切除的，转移性高分化进展期胰腺神经内分泌瘤（pNET）成年患者。
adaptation_disease_en: Sunitinib is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with gastrointestinal stromal tumor (GIST) after disease progression on or intolerance to imatinib mesylate.
Sunitinib is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC).
Sunitinb is indicated for treatment of progressive, well-differentiated pancreatic neuroendocrine tumors (pNET) in adult patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 舒尼替尼是一种抑制多种受体酪氨酸激酶(RTKs)的小分子，其中一些与肿瘤生长、病理血管生成和癌症转移进展有关。舒尼替是评价其抑制活性对各种激酶(激酶> 80)和被确认为一种抑制剂的血小板源生长因子受体(PDGFRα和PDGFRβ),血管内皮生长因子受体(VEGFR2 VEGFR1,和VEGFR3),干细胞因子受体(装备),Fms-like酪氨酸激酶3 (FLT3)集落刺激因子受体1型(CSF-1R)和胶质细胞系衍生神经营养因子受体(RET)。舒尼替尼对这些RTKs活性的抑制已在生化和细胞检测中得到证实，而对功能的抑制已在细胞增殖检测中得到证实。在生化和细胞检测中，初级代谢物与舒尼替尼表现出相似的效力。舒尼替尼可以抑制体内表达RTK靶点的肿瘤移植瘤中多种RTKs (PDGFR、VEGFR2、KIT)的磷酸化，并在一些癌症实验模型中显示可以抑制肿瘤生长或肿瘤消退和/或肿瘤转移。舒尼替尼在体外可以抑制表达异常RTKs (PDGFR、RET或KIT)的肿瘤细胞的生长，在体内可以抑制PDGFR fr和vegfr2依赖的肿瘤血管生成。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An indolinone derivative and tyrosine kinase inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Sunitinib blocks the tyrosine kinase activities of vascular endothelial growth factor receptor 2 (VEGFR2), platelet-derived growth factor receptor b (PDGFRb), and c-kit, thereby inhibiting angiogenesis and cell proliferation.  This agent also inhibits the phosphorylation of Fms-related tyrosine kinase 3 (FLT3), another receptor tyrosine kinase expressed by some leukemic cells.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗新确诊的费城染色体阳性（Ph+）慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）成年患者。

FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)联合化疗用于治疗1岁及以上新确诊为费城染色体阳性（Ph+）的急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）的儿科患者。
FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗对其他疗法无效或不能耐受的费城染色体阳性（Ph+）的急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）成年患者。

FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗1岁及以上慢性期费城染色体阳性（Ph+）慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）的儿科患者。
FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗对伊马替尼等一线药物化疗不敏感的各期费城染色体阳性（Ph+）慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）成年患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 根据建模研究，预测达沙替尼可与ABL激酶的多种构象结合。 在甲磺酸伊马替尼敏感和耐药型的白血病细胞系中，达沙替尼均表现出体外活性。 达沙替尼可抑制过表达BCR-ABL的慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）和急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）细胞的生长。 达沙替尼可克服因BCR-ABL激酶结构域突变、SRC家族激酶（LYN，HCK）的旁信号通路的激活以及多药耐药基因过表达而引起的伊马替尼耐药性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable synthetic small molecule-inhibitor of SRC-family protein-tyrosine kinases.  Dasatinib binds to and inhibits the growth-promoting activities of these kinases. Apparently because of its less stringent binding affinity for the BCR-ABL kinase, dasatinib has been shown to overcome the resistance to imatinib of chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) cells harboring BCR-ABL kinase domain point mutations. SRC-family protein-tyrosine kinases interact with a variety of cell-surface receptors and participate in intracellular signal transduction pathways; tumorigenic forms can occur through altered regulation or expression of the endogenous protein and by way of virally-encoded kinase genes.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准恩沙替尼用于此前接受过克唑替尼治疗后进展或对克唑替尼不耐受的ALK阳性、局部晚期或转移性NSCLC患者的治疗。
FDA批准恩沙替尼用于治疗ALK阳性、未经ALK抑制剂治疗的局部晚期或转移性NSCLC成年患者。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 恩沙替尼是一种酪氨酸激酶间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK）小分子抑制剂，具有潜在的抗肿瘤活性。恩沙替尼结合并抑制ALK从而使ALK介导的信号传导中断，最终抑制ALK表达肿瘤细胞的肿瘤细胞生长。体外细胞学研究中，相比一代ALK抑制剂克唑替尼，在抑制ALK阳性肺癌细胞系的生长能力方面，恩沙替尼是克唑替尼的10倍。对于导致克唑替尼耐药的L1196M和C1156Y突变，恩沙替尼也表现出较强的抑制活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available small molecule inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, ensartinib binds to and inhibits ALK kinase, ALK fusion proteins and ALK point mutation variants. Inhibition of ALK leads to the disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and eventually inhibits tumor cell growth in ALK-expressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK is not expressed in healthy adult human tissue but ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors; ALK mutations are associated with acquired resistance to small molecule tyrosine kinase inhibitors.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准恩曲替尼用于ROS1阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌成年患者。
FDA通过加速通道批准恩曲替尼用于治疗1个月以上NTRK融合阳性且无已知获得性耐药突变的实体瘤患者（成人+儿童），患者存在转移性疾病或手术切除可能导致严重并发症，以及治疗后进展或没有令人满意的替代疗法。
NMPA批准恩曲替尼用于NTRK基因融合阳性且未携带已知继发性耐药突变的成人和12岁及以上的儿童实体瘤患者的治疗。
NMPA批准恩曲替尼用于ROS1阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌成人患者。
approval_tumour: 实体瘤;solid tumor
非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Entrectinib是原肌癌酪氨酸蛋白激酶ROS1（原为神经营养性酪氨酸受体激酶[NTRK]基因NTRK1，NTRK2和NTRK3编码的原肌球蛋白受体酪氨酸激酶（TRK）的抑制剂）和间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK），IC 50值为0.1至2 nM。 Entrectinib还抑制JAK2和TNK2，IC 50值> 5 nM。Entrectinib的主要活性代谢产物M5对TRK，ROS1和ALK的体外活性相似。包含TRK，ROS1或ALK激酶结构域的融合蛋白可通过过度激活下游信号传导途径来驱动致瘤潜力，从而导致不受限制的细胞增殖。 Entrectinib证明了对来自具有NTRK，ROS1和ALK融合基因的多种肿瘤类型的癌细胞系的体外和体内抑制作用。 Entrectinib在多种动物物种（小鼠，大鼠和狗）中表现出稳态的脑血浆浓度比为0.4 – 2.2，并在颅内植入TRKA和ALK驱动的肿瘤细胞的小鼠体内表现出体内抗肿瘤活性线。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the tyrosine kinases tropomyosin receptor kinases (Trk) A, B and C, C-ros oncogene 1 (ROS1) and anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, entrectinib binds to and inhibits TrkA, TrkB, TrkC, ROS1 and ALK. Inhibition of these kinases may result in a disruption of TrkA-, TrkB-, TrkC-, ROS1-, and ALK-mediated signaling. This leads to an induction of apoptosis and an inhibition of tumor cell proliferation in tumor cells that express these kinases. TrkA, TrkB, TrkC, ROS1 and ALK are overexpressed in a variety of cancer cell types.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准尼洛替尼用于治疗新诊断的费城染色体阳性的慢性髓性白血病（Ph+CML）慢性期成人患者。
FDA批准尼洛替尼用于治疗对既往治疗（包括伊马替尼）耐药或不耐受的费城染色体阳性的Ph+CML慢性期(CP)或加速期(AP)成人患者。
FDA批准尼洛替尼用于治疗新诊断的费城染色体阳性的慢性髓性白血病（Ph+ CML）慢性期，或对既往酪氨酸激酶抑制剂 (TKI) 治疗耐药或不耐受的Ph+ CML慢性期(CP)或加速期(AP)的1岁以上的儿童患者。
NMPA批准尼洛替尼用于治疗新诊断的费城染色体阳性的慢性髓性白血病（Ph+CML)慢性期成人患者。
NMPA批准尼洛替尼用于对既往治疗（包括伊马替尼）耐药或不耐受的费城染色体阳性的慢性髓性白血病（Ph+CML)慢性期或加速期成人患者。
NMPA批准尼洛替尼用于2岁以上儿童慢性髓性白血病患者。
adaptation_disease_en: The FDA has approved nilotinib for the treatment of newly-diagnosed adult patients with Philadelphia chromosome-positive chronic myeloid leukemia (Ph+ CML) in the chronic phase.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Nilotinib是BCR-ABL激酶的抑制剂。Nilotinib结合并稳定ABL蛋白激酶结构域的非活性构象。 在体外，Nilotinib抑制BCR-ABL介导的鼠白血病细胞系和Ph + CML患者的人细胞系的增殖。 在测定的条件下，Nilotinib能够克服BCR-ABL激酶突变导致的Imatinib（伊马替尼）耐药性。 Nilotinib抑制以下激酶的自磷酸化IC50值为：BCR-ABL（20至60 nM），PDGFR（69 nM），c-KIT（210 nM），CSF-1R（125至250 nM）和DDR1 （3.7 nM）。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable aminopyrimidine-derivative Bcr-Abl tyrosine kinase inhibitor with antineoplastic activity. Designed to overcome imatinib resistance, nilotinib binds to and stabilizes the inactive conformation of the kinase domain of the Abl protein of the Bcr-Abl fusion protein, resulting in the inhibition of the Bcr-Abl-mediated proliferation of Philadelphia chromosome-positive (Ph+) chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) cells. This agent also inhibits the receptor tyrosine kinases platelet-derived growth factor receptor (PDGF-R) and c-kit, a receptor tyrosine kinase mutated and constitutively activated in most gastrointestinal stromal tumors (GISTs). With a binding mode that is energetically more favorable than that of imatinib, nilotinib has been shown to have an approximately 20-fold increased potency in kinase and proliferation assays compared to imatinib.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经3线及以上化疗的、HRD阳性（携带BRCA基因的致病或疑似致病性突变或基因组存在不稳定性并在对最后一次铂类化疗反应后6个月以上出现疾病进展）的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌及原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于一线含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。

NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者对一线含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于铂敏感的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者在含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的、携带有害或疑似有害胚系BRCA突变的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌的成年患者的维持治疗。
adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Niraparib for the treatment of adult patients with advanced ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer who have been treated with 3 or more prior chemotherapy regimens and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD) positive status defined by either:
1）a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, or
2）genomic instability and who have progressed more than 6 months after response to the last platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Niraparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with recurrent epithelial 
ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to 
platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Niraparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy.
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer
腹膜癌;Peritoneal Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Niraparib（尼拉帕利）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶PARP-1和PARP-2的抑制剂，它们在DNA修复中起作用。 体外研究表明，Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤，细胞凋亡和细胞死亡。 在具有或不具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的肿瘤细胞系中观察到了Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性增加。 在具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的人类癌细胞系的小鼠异种移植模型中，以及在具有突变或野生型BRCA1 / 2的同源重组缺陷的人类患者源性异种移植肿瘤模型中，Niraparib降低了肿瘤的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2 (PARP-1 and -2), with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, niraparib binds to and inhibits the activity of PARP-1 and -2, thereby inhibiting PARP-1 and -2-mediated DNA repair, enhancing the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promoting genomic instability and resulting in apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and is activated by single-strand DNA (ssDNA) breaks.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准AKEEGA（尼拉帕利和醋酸阿比特龙）双重作用片剂联合泼尼松用于治疗携带有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）的成年患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Niraparib（尼拉帕利）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶PARP-1和PARP-2的抑制剂，它们在DNA修复中起作用。 体外研究表明，Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤，细胞凋亡和细胞死亡。 在具有或不具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的肿瘤细胞系中观察到了Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性增加。 在具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的人类癌细胞系的小鼠异种移植模型中，以及在具有突变或野生型BRCA1 / 2的同源重组缺陷的人类患者源性异种移植肿瘤模型中，Niraparib降低了肿瘤的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2 (PARP-1 and -2), with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, niraparib binds to and inhibits the activity of PARP-1 and -2, thereby inhibiting PARP-1 and -2-mediated DNA repair, enhancing the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promoting genomic instability and resulting in apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and is activated by single-strand DNA (ssDNA) breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿比特龙是一种具有抗雄激素活性的口服醋酸酯甾体化合物，阿比特龙抑制类固醇17a-单加氧酶的酶活性，它是细胞色素p450家族的一员，催化参与睾酮合成的类固醇中间体的17a-羟基化。这种药剂可能会抑制睾丸和肾上腺产生睾酮，从而达到阉割范围水平。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally active acetate ester form of the steroidal compound abiraterone with antiandrogen activity. Abiraterone inhibits the enzymatic activity of steroid 17alpha-monooxygenase (17alpha-hydrolase/C17,20 lyase complex), a member of the cytochrome p450 family that catalyzes the 17alpha-hydroxylation of steroid intermediates involved in testosterone synthesis. Administration of this agent may suppress testosterone production by both the testes and the adrenals to castrate-range levels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节作用的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着进入细胞后，泼尼松进入核内，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变和抑制促炎性细胞因子的产生。该药物还能减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cell populations.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 尼拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 氟唑帕利为小分子PARP抑制剂，可抑制BRCA1/2功能异常细胞中的DNA修复过程，诱导细胞周期阻滞，进而抑制肿瘤细胞增殖。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, fluzoparib inhibits PARP 1 and 2 activity, which inhibits PARP-mediated repair of damaged DNA via the base excision repair (BER) pathway, enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability, and leads to an induction of apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyze post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins, which then transduce signals to recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA. PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿帕替尼为一种小分子血管内皮生长因子受体2(VEGFR2）酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，可抑制肿瘤血管生成。动物研究表明其可明显抑制多种小鼠肿瘤模型的肿瘤生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, small-molecule receptor tyrosine kinase inhibitor with potential antiangiogenic and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, rivoceranib selectively binds to and inhibits vascular endothelial growth factor receptor 2, which may inhibit VEGF-stimulated endothelial cell migration and proliferation and decrease tumor microvessel density. In addition, this agent mildly inhibits c-Kit and c-SRC tyrosine kinases.

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于携带有害BRCA突变（胚系和/或体细胞）、对铂类化疗完全或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成年患者的维持治疗。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved RUBRACA for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with a deleterious BRCA mutation (germline and/or somatic)- associated recurrent epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to platinum-based chemotherapy.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照III期临床试验（ARIEL3，NCT01968213），入组564名对铂类化疗有反应的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者，这些患者之前至少接受过两种铂类化疗，并且对最近的铂类化疗有完全或部分反应。患者被随机分配（2:1）至每天两次口服鲁卡帕尼(Rucaparib) 600 mg（n=372）或安慰剂（n=189），并接受治疗直至疾病进展或出现不可接受的毒性。通过NGS分析肿瘤组织样本以确定是否携带有害的体细胞或胚系BRCA突变。基于携带胚系或体细胞BRCA突变的tBRCA亚组评估结果有效性。主要疗效评估为研究者根据RECIST1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），另一个疗效评估为总生存期（OS）。入组的564名患者的ECOG评分均为0或1，且均接受过至少二线铂类治疗（2-5）；入组患者主要是白人（84%）。入组患者中有196名携带tBRCA突变，33%患者最近一次铂类化疗效果为完全缓解，41%患者自倒数第2次铂类化疗以来无进展间隔为6-12个月，59%为＞12个月，32%患者在基线时存在可测量的疾病。在鲁卡帕尼组和安慰剂组中，患者中位年龄分别为58岁（42-81岁）和59岁（36岁-86岁）；接受过贝伐珠单抗治疗的比例分别为22%和17%。研究结果显示，在tBRCA亚组中，鲁卡帕尼组和安慰剂组的中位PFS分别为16.6个月 vs 5.4个月，鲁卡帕尼患者的PFS存在统计学意义的显着改善；探索性OS分析显示，鲁卡帕尼组和安慰剂组的中位OS分别为45.9个月 vs 47.8个月，未达到统计学意义。基于上述研究，FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于携带有害BRCA突变（胚系和/或体细胞）、对铂类化疗完全或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成年患者的维持治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害BRCA胚系突变的（gBRCAm）、接受一线铂类化疗至少16周无进展的转移性胰腺癌成人患者的治疗。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Olaparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious gBRCAm metastatic pancreatic adenocarcinoma whose disease has not progressed on at least 16 weeks of a first-line platinum-based chemotherapy regimen.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心的III期临床试验（POLO, NCT02184195），入组154例接受一线铂类化疗至少16周无进展的携带有害或疑似有害BRCA胚系突变的转移性胰腺癌患者。患者按照3:2比例随机接受每日两次口服奥拉帕利300mg（92例）或安慰剂（62例）治疗。研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为总生存期（OS）及客观缓解率（ORR）。研究结果显示，奥拉帕利组对比安慰剂组的中位PFS为7.4个月 vs 3.8个月，ORR为23% vs 12%，中位DOR为25个月 vs 4个月。基于上述研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害BRCA胚系突变的（gBRCAm）、接受一线铂类化疗至少16周无进展的转移性胰腺癌成人患者的治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Olaparib in combination with bevacizumab for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary 
peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD)-positive status defined by either: a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, and/or genomic instability.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心的III 期临床试验（PAOLA-1, NCT03737643），入组806例经一线含铂化疗和贝伐珠单抗治疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期高级别上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者。患者按照2:1比例随机接受每日两次口服奥拉帕利（300mg）联合贝伐珠单抗（537例）或安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗（269例）治疗，研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组对比安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组的中位PFS分别为22.1 个月 和16.6 个月（HR 0.59; 95% CI: 0.49-0.72;p<0.0001）；同时，研究者对入组患者的HRD及tBRCAm进行了检测并分组分析，结果显示，对于HRD阳性患者，经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS显著高于安慰剂组（28.1 个月 vs 16.6个月），tBRCA阳性患者经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS同样显著高于安慰剂组（37.2 个月 vs 21.7 个月），而HRD和tBRCA同时阳性的患者PFS获益最为明显（37.2 个月 vs 17.7个月）。基于上述研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准帕米帕利用于既往经过二线及以上化疗的伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、开放标签I/II期临床试验（NCT03333915）的II期临床部分，入组113例既往接受过至少两项标准化疗、携有胚系BRCA1/2突变的高级别上皮性卵巢癌（包括输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌）或高级别子宫内膜上皮样癌中国患者，其中包括90例晚期铂敏感卵巢癌患者（队列1）和23例晚期铂耐药卵巢癌患者（队列2）。患者接受帕米帕利每日两次口服用药、每次60 mg的治疗，试验的主要终点为客观缓解率（ORR）。在101例疗效可评估患者中，队列1中的铂敏感卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为17.0个月，ORR为68.3%，中位缓解持续时间（DOR）为13.8个月；队列2中的铂耐药卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为11.6个月，ORR为31.6%，中位DOR为11.1个月。基于上述研究，NMPA附条件批准帕米帕利用于治疗既往经过二线及以上化疗、伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌成人患者的治疗。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Talazoparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) HER2-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、开放标签、双臂、多中心的III期临床试验（EMBRACA, NCT01945775），入组431名携带BRCA1/2胚系突变的局部晚期或转移性HER2阴性乳腺癌患者，患者既往接受过细胞毒性化疗方案不超过3种。患者被随机（2:1）分为2组，试验组（287例）接受他拉唑帕利（1 mg）治疗，对照组（144例）接受医疗机构选择的化疗（卡培他滨、艾立布林、吉西他滨或长春瑞滨）。研究结果显示，他拉唑帕利治疗组的无进展生存期（PFS）和客观缓解率（ORR）获益显著高于化疗组，两组的中位PFS和ORR分别为8.6个月 vs 5.6个月和50.1% vs 18.4%。基于上述研究，FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌患者的治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的、携带有害或疑似有害胚系BRCA突变的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌的成年患者的维持治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项双盲、安慰剂对照的III期临床试验（NOVA, NCT01847274），入组了553例铂敏感的复发性上皮卵巢癌、输卵管癌和原发性腹膜癌患者，所有患者之前至少接受过两种含铂方案化疗且最后一次含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解。患者根据按照2:1比例随机接受每日一次口服尼拉帕利（300 mg）或安慰剂治疗，并根据是否携带有害或疑似有害胚系BRCA突变，将患者分为BRCA胚系突变阳性队列即gBRCAmut队列（203例）和BRCA胚系突变阴性队列（350例）。疗效结果仅基于gBRCAmut队列。研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS），总生存期（OS）是附加疗效指标。研究结果显示，gBRCAmut队列中，患者接受尼拉帕利对比安慰剂的疾病进展风险降低了74%，中位PFS延长到近4倍（21个月 vs 5.5个月）。探索性OS结果显示，gBRCAmut队列中，尼拉帕利 vs 安慰剂治疗的中位OS分别为40.9个月 vs 38.1个月，死亡风险降低了15% 。基于上述研究，FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的、携带有害或疑似有害胚系BRCA突变的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌的成年患者的维持治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多队列III期试验（TALAPRO-2，NCT03395197），纳入399例同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)患者，并按1:1的比例随机接受恩扎卢胺160 mg/天+他拉唑帕利 0.5mg/天或安慰剂，直到不可接受的毒性或疾病进展（患者需要事先行睾丸切除术，如果没有进行手术，则接受促性腺激素释放激素(GnRH)类似物。HRR基因：ATM、ATR、BRCA1、BRCA2、CDK12、 CHEK2、FANCA、MLH1、MRE11A、NBN、PALB2、RAD51C）。主要疗效指标是由盲法独立中心评审（BICR）根据RECIST 1.1和前列腺癌工作组(PCWG3)(针对骨骼)标准评估的放射学无进展生存期(rPFS)，另一个疗效指标是总生存期（OS）。在HRR基因突变人群中，与安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组相比，他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组的rPFS有统计学上的显著改善，中位rPFS：他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组vs安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组为未达到vs13.8个月(HR 0.45; 95% CI: 0.33, 0.61; p<0.0001)。在rPFS分析时，OS数据还不成熟(24%的患者死亡)。TALAPRO-2中针对BRCA突变状态的探索性分析显示，针对rPFS，BRCA突变组的HR为0.20 (95% CI: 0.11, 0.36)，其他突变组的HR为0.72(95% CI:0.49,1.07)。基于上述研究，FDA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的多中心III期临床试验（PROpel; NCT03732820），入组了796名mCRPC患者，患者被随机分配（1：1）接受奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙或安慰剂联合阿比特龙，并且所有患者还接受泼尼松或泼尼松龙治疗。BRCA基因突变(BRCAm)状态在随机分组后、初步分析前对ctDNA或组织样本进行测定。主要疗效终点指标为研究者评估的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS），其他疗效终点指标包括总生存期（OS）。在接受检测的796名患者中，85名患者（11%）检测出BRCAm。研究结果显示，在意向治疗（ITT）人群中，观察到与安慰剂联合阿比特龙相比，奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙的rPFS出现统计学显著改善。85例（11% ITT人群）BRCAm患者的探索性亚组分析显示，奥拉帕利+阿比特龙组 vs 安慰剂+阿比特龙组中位rPFS分别为NR vs 8个月（风险比[HR]=0.24），中位OS分别为NR vs 23个月（HR=0.30）。711例（89% ITT人群）无BRCAm的患者中，rPFS HR为0.77，OS HR为0.92，表明在ITT人群中观察到的rPFS改善主要归因于BRCAm患者。基于以上研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 尼拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准AKEEGA（尼拉帕利和醋酸阿比特龙）双重作用片剂联合泼尼松用于治疗携带有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）的成年患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机双盲、安慰剂对照的、多中心、多队列、III期临床试验（MAGNITUDE，NCT03748641），入组423例携带HRR相关基因变异（mHRR）的转移性趋势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者，随机（1:1）分配至尼拉帕利联合阿比特龙（AKEEGA组）和安慰剂联合阿比特龙组（安慰剂组），直到毒性不耐受或疾病进展，所有患者均接受每日10mg泼尼松和GnRH类似物治疗或既往经双侧睾丸切除术。在纳入的423例患者中，225例（53%）有BRCA基因突变（BRCAm）。主要疗效指标是BICR评估得到的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS）、其他疗效指标包括总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，在BRCAm和意向治疗（ITT）人群中观察到AKEEGA组与安慰剂组相比rPFS有统计学显著改善，BRCAm亚组中两组的PFS风险比为0.53，中位rPFS分别为16.6个月和10.9个月。在BRCAm患者亚组的探索性OS分析中，AKEEGA组与安慰剂组的中位OS分别为30.4个月和28.6个月， OS风险比为0.79。基于上述研究，FDA批准AKEEGA（尼拉帕利和醋酸阿比特龙）双重作用片剂联合泼尼松用于治疗携带有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）的成年患者。

一项多中心1/2期临床试验（PETRA），评估Saruparib在306名经治HRR缺陷型乳腺、卵巢、胰腺或前列腺癌患者中的安全性、耐受性和有效性。患者的肿瘤在HRR相关基因中出现突变，包括：BRCA1、BRCA2、PALB2、RAD51C或RAD51D。数据显示，在接受60mg Saruparib治疗的31名乳腺癌患者中，客观缓解率（ORR）为48.4%，中位缓解持续时间（mDOR）为7.3个月，中位无进展生存期（PFS）为9.1个月。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Olaparib in combination with bevacizumab for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary 
peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD)-positive status defined by either: a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, and/or genomic instability.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心的III 期临床试验（PAOLA-1, NCT03737643），入组806例经一线含铂化疗和贝伐珠单抗治疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期高级别上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者。患者按照2:1比例随机接受每日两次口服奥拉帕利（300mg）联合贝伐珠单抗（537例）或安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗（269例）治疗，研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组对比安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组的中位PFS分别为22.1 个月 和16.6 个月（HR 0.59; 95% CI: 0.49-0.72;p<0.0001）；同时，研究者对入组患者的HRD及tBRCAm进行了检测并分组分析，结果显示，对于HRD阳性患者，经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS显著高于安慰剂组（28.1 个月 vs 16.6个月），tBRCA阳性患者经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS同样显著高于安慰剂组（37.2 个月 vs 21.7 个月），而HRD和tBRCA同时阳性的患者PFS获益最为明显（37.2 个月 vs 17.7个月）。基于上述研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准尼拉帕利用于一线含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Niraparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项双盲、安慰剂对照的III期临床试验（PRIMA, NCT02655016），入组了733例经一线含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌和腹膜癌患者。试验总人群与同源重组缺陷（HRD）亚人群（373例）均按2:1比例随机接受尼拉帕利或安慰剂对照治疗。研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS）。研究结果显示，在HRD阴性人群中，尼拉帕利组的中位PFS相比于安慰剂组显著延长（8.1个月 vs 5.4个月），疾病进展或死亡风险降低32%（HR=0.68）；在同源重组缺陷亚人群中，尼拉帕利治疗组的中位PFS相比于安慰剂组有更加显著的提升（21.9个月 vs 10.4个月）；在试验总人群中，尼拉帕利治疗组的中位PFS相比于安慰剂组有显著提升（13.8个月 vs 8.2个月）。基于上述研究，FDA批准尼拉帕利用于一线含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。

p_var.variant_desc_cn: 微卫星（Microsatellite）又称简单重复序列（SSR），是指遍布于人类基因组中的短串联重复序列，一般由1-6个核苷酸组成。DNA复制时，肿瘤细胞内的微卫星由于重复单位的插入或缺失而造成的微卫星长度的变化，称为微卫星不稳定性（Microsatellite Instability, MSI）。大量研究表明，MSI是由错配修复（mismatch repair，MMR）基因突变或功能缺陷引起的（PMID: 25701956）。MSI在多种癌种中被发现，包括子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌和胃腺癌等。据报道，10%-15%的散发性结直肠癌患者存在MSI（PMID: 15528785），NCCN指南明确推荐所有结直肠癌患者均需考虑做MSI或MMR检测。临床上也已将MSI作为结直肠癌及其他实体瘤预后和制定辅助治疗方案的重要分子标志物。
p_var.variant_desc_en: Microsatellite, also known as simple repeat sequence (SSR), refers to the short tandem repeat sequences throughout the human genome, generally composed of 1-6 nucleotides. During DNA replication, Microsatellite Instability (MSI) is defined as the change in microsatellite length caused by the insertion or deletion of repeat units in tumor cells. Numerous studies have shown that MSI is caused by mismatch repair (MMR) gene mutations or functional defects (PMID: 25701956). MSI has been found in a variety of cancers, including endometrial cancer, colorectal cancer, and gastric adenocarcinoma. MSI has been reported in 10%-15% of sporadic colorectal cancer patients (PMID: 15528785), and the NCCN guidelines clearly recommend that all patients with colorectal cancer should be considered for MSI or MMR testing. MSI has also been regarded as an important molecular marker for the prognosis and adjuvant treatment of colorectal cancer and other solid tumors.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为gain of function，OncoKB数据库报道为Oncogenic，Cancer Hotspots数据库记录14次KIT蛋白第576位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L576P记录14次。该变异可导致Kit持续磷酸化及细胞转化（PMID: 17372901）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as gain of function in the CKB database, and Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the Cancer Hotspots database records 14 times of amino acid change at the KIT protein position 576, of which the mutant L576P is recorded 14 times. This variation can lead to the continuous phosphorylation and cell transformation of Kit (PMID: 17372901). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第576位氨基酸由亮氨酸突变为脯氨酸。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 576th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Leucine to Proline.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: NCCN GIST指南（2023 V1）中指出，对于携带伊马替尼敏感突变（不包括D842V在内的PDGFRA 18号外显子伊马替尼不敏感突变）的GIST患者，如果可手术，建议使用伊马替尼作为新辅助治疗，完全切除后，对于中度/高度复发风险的患者，可考虑继续使用伊马替尼作为辅助治疗。如为不可手术的、侵袭性或转移性疾病的患者，建议使用伊马替尼作为一线治疗，二线治疗推荐舒尼替尼或瑞派替尼（150mg/天）（如果无法耐受舒尼替尼），三线治疗推荐瑞戈非尼。

NCCN GIST指南（2023 V1）中指出，对于携带伊马替尼敏感突变（不包括D842V在内的PDGFRA 18号外显子伊马替尼不敏感突变）的GIST患者，如果可手术，建议使用伊马替尼作为新辅助治疗，完全切除后，对于中度/高度复发风险的患者，可考虑继续使用伊马替尼作为辅助治疗。如为不可手术的、侵袭性或转移性疾病的患者，建议使用伊马替尼作为一线治疗，二线治疗推荐舒尼替尼或瑞派替尼（150mg/天）（如果无法耐受舒尼替尼），三线治疗推荐瑞戈非尼。

NCCN GIST指南（2023 V1）中指出，对于携带伊马替尼敏感突变（不包括D842V在内的PDGFRA 18号外显子伊马替尼不敏感突变）的GIST患者，如果可手术，建议使用伊马替尼作为新辅助治疗，完全切除后，对于中度/高度复发风险的患者，可考虑继续使用伊马替尼作为辅助治疗。如为不可手术的、侵袭性或转移性疾病的患者，建议使用伊马替尼作为一线治疗，二线治疗推荐舒尼替尼或瑞派替尼（150mg/天）（如果无法耐受舒尼替尼），三线治疗推荐瑞戈非尼。

一项随机、开放标签、多中心的III期临床试验（ENESTg1, NCT00785785, PMID: 25882987），入组647位转移性和/或不可切除胃肠道间质瘤，评估尼洛替尼对比伊马替尼作为一线治疗的疗效（324位接受尼洛替尼治疗，320位接受伊马替尼治疗）；主要研究终点为PFS。结果显示2年无进展生存率，伊马替尼优于尼洛替尼（59.2% vs 51.6%）；在KIT 11号外显子突变亚组中，尼洛替尼和伊马替尼组的2年无进展生存率相似（69.6% vs 67.5%）。
一项临床前试验中（PMID: 31205508），携带KIT V559D/A/G、L576P、A829P、K642E突变的GIST细胞系对阿昔替尼敏感。携带T670I的GIST细胞系对阿昔替尼、舒尼替尼、瑞戈非尼敏感。携带V654A突变的细胞系对阿昔替尼、舒尼替尼敏感，同时，在携带V654A突变的细胞系移植瘤模型中，阿昔替尼能够抑制肿瘤生长。
有病例报道（PMID: 30094412），一位MET表达阳性、携带KIT c.2464A>T p.(N822Y)变异的肢端黑色素瘤患者经达沙替尼联合克唑替尼治疗约5个月后，发现脑转移灶缩小、瘤周水肿得到消退，定期影像学检查发现，所有转移灶的症状得到持续控制达34个月。进一步的细胞实验表明，表达L576P、N822Y、S476I的黑色素瘤细胞对达沙替尼敏感。

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00001656（2/120764）、0.000008091（2/247180），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录6次FGFR1蛋白第150位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P150S记录5次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00001656(2/120764), 0.000008091(2/247180) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the FGFR1 protein position 150, of which the mutant P150S is recorded 5 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第150位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为丝氨酸。
